text_block_list.name: Monólogo
text_block_list.text:
Whether by the will of the gods or her<n>own efforts,
Matikanefukukitaru<n>claims victory.

text_block_list.name: Monólogo
text_block_list.text:
After witnessing her behavior before<n>the race,
Silence Suzuka is worried<n>about
Matikanefukukitaru's<n>preoccupation with luck.

text_block_list.name: Monólogo
text_block_list.text:
Taking in Silence Suzuka's concerns,
Matikanefukukitaru comes back to<n>her senses.

text_block_list.name: Monólogo
text_block_list.text:
Realizing her overdependence on<n>luck, she
freezes up, questioning<n>whether any of her
victories are really<n>her own.
